recommendations.title: White Men Can't Jump
recommendations.overview: Two street basketball hustlers try to con each other, then team up for a bigger score.

recommendations.title: Tin Cup
recommendations.overview: A washed up golf pro working at a driving range tries to qualify for the US Open in order to win the heart of his succesful rival's girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Play It to the Bone

recommendations.title: Just Getting Started

recommendations.title: Before the Devil Knows You're Dead
recommendations.overview: When two brothers organize the robbery of their parents' jewelry store, the job goes horribly wrong, triggering a series of events that send them and their family hurtling towards a shattering climax.

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.

recommendations.title: Drishyam 2
recommendations.overview: 7 years after the events of Drishyam, the family lives with the trauma from that fateful night. A gripping tale of an investigation and a family threatened by it. Will Georgekutty be able to protect his family this time?
